description: Google Cloud Text-to-Speech is a managed speech synthesis service that converts text into spoken audio using Google's voice models. It supports multiple voices, languages, and synthesis modes including standard and long-audio generation.
summary: Google Cloud Text-to-Speech on texttospeech.googleapis.com exposes a REST API authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens via gcloud/ADC; no separate GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on this domain.
